obverse.description: Laureate bust of King in high armor, with pendant of the Order of the Elephant. King wears a scarf and a fur band over shoulders Legend continuous above the portrait.
obverse.lettering: FRIDERICUS· III· D· G· DAN· NOR· V· GOT· REX
obverse.lettering_translation: Frederik III Dei Gratia King of Denmark (DAN), Norway (NOR), the Wends(V) and the Goths (GOT)

reverse.description: Three oval shields with ornate frames (with arms of Sweden, Denmark and Norway) in center above a cross with thick and long arms. Above the three shields is the crown of Denmark intersected by cross upper arm. Moreover the three central shields are encircled by a band interwoven with cross arms, at which is attached the pendant of the Order of the Elephant. Around the band, are the 15 small oval shield of the provinces of the Kingdom of Denmark. Legend around rim, divided in four parts by the cross arms.
reverse.lettering: DVX · SLES ·   |   HOL · STOR ·   |   DITM · COM ·   |   OLD & DELM
reverse.lettering_translation: Duke of Schleswig, Holstein, Stormarn and Dithmarschen, Count of Oldenburg and Delmenhorst.

edge.description: If present lettering in relief with King's motto, mintmark and date in roman numbers
edge.lettering_translation: The Lord will be my guide
